description: A comprehensive airline booking service that provides flight search, reservation management, and user account operations for air travel.

tools.name: list_airports
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all available airports with their corresponding IATA codes and city names.

airports.description: List of all available airports in the system.

city.description: The city where the airport is located.

tools.name: search_flights
tools.description: Search for available direct flights between two airports on a specified date.

origin.description: The IATA code of the departure airport (e.g., 'JFK').

destination.description: The IATA code of the arrival airport (e.g., 'LAX').

date.description: The date of the flight in YYYY-MM-DD format.

flights.description: List of available flights matching the search criteria.

flight_number.description: The unique identifier for the flight (e.g., 'AA123').

origin.description: The IATA code of the departure airport.

destination.description: The IATA code of the arrival airport.

scheduled_departure.description: The scheduled departure time of the flight.

available_seats.description: Seat availability breakdown by cabin class.

prices.description: Ticket prices breakdown by cabin class.

tools.name: get_flight_status
tools.description: Retrieve the current operational status of a specific flight on a given date.

flight_number.description: The unique identifier for the flight (e.g., 'AA123').

date.description: The date of the flight in YYYY-MM-DD format.

flight_number.description: The unique identifier for the flight.

status.description: The current operational status of the flight (e.g., 'available', 'delayed', 'cancelled').

date.description: The date of the flight in YYYY-MM-DD format.

tools.name: get_user_details
tools.description: Retrieve a user's profile information including their reservation history and saved payment methods.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the customer account.
The unique identifier of the customer account.

name.description: The full name of the customer.

reservations.description: List of reservation IDs associated with the customer.

payment_methods.description: List of saved payment methods for the customer.

tools.name: get_reservation_details
tools.description: Retrieve complete details of a specific flight reservation including flights, passengers, and pricing.

reservation_id.description: The unique identifier of the flight booking.
The unique identifier of the flight booking.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the customer account who made the booking.

flights.description: List of flight segments included in the reservation.

passengers.description: List of passengers included in the reservation.

total_price.description: The total price of the reservation in the default currency.

status.description: The current status of the reservation (e.g., 'confirmed', 'cancelled').

tools.name: book_reservation
tools.description: Create a new flight reservation with specified flights, passengers, and additional services.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the customer account making the booking.

origin.description: The IATA code of the departure airport (e.g., 'JFK').

destination.description: The IATA code of the arrival airport (e.g., 'LAX').

flight_type.description: The type of travel itinerary (e.g., 'one_way' or 'round_trip').

cabin.description: The service class for the travel (e.g., 'economy', 'business').

flights.description: Detailed list of flight segments to be booked.

passengers.description: Comprehensive list of passenger details for the booking.

payment_method.description: The payment method used for the booking.

total_baggages.description: Total number of baggage pieces for all passengers.

nonfree_baggages.description: Number of baggage pieces that require additional payment beyond the free allowance.

insurance.description: Whether to include travel insurance coverage for the trip.

reservation_id.description: The unique identifier of the newly created flight booking.

status.description: The current status of the reservation (e.g., 'confirmed').

total_price.description: The total price charged for the reservation in the default currency.

tools.name: update_reservation_flights
tools.description: Modify the flight segments or cabin class of an existing reservation.

reservation_id.description: The unique identifier of the flight booking to be updated.

cabin.description: The service class for the travel (e.g., 'economy', 'business').

flights.description: The complete new set of flight segments for the booking.

payment_method.description: The payment method used for any additional charges.

reservation_id.description: The unique identifier of the updated flight booking.

status.description: The current status of the reservation after the update.

additional_charge.description: The additional amount charged for the flight changes in the default currency.

tools.name: update_reservation_passengers
tools.description: Update passenger information for an existing reservation.

reservation_id.description: The unique identifier of the flight booking to be updated.

passengers.description: Updated list of passenger details for the booking.

reservation_id.description: The unique identifier of the updated flight booking.

status.description: The current status of the reservation after the passenger update.

tools.name: update_reservation_baggage
tools.description: Modify the baggage allowance for an existing reservation.

reservation_id.description: The unique identifier of the flight booking to be updated.

total_baggages.description: Updated total number of baggage pieces for all passengers.

nonfree_baggages.description: Updated count of baggage pieces that require additional payment.

payment_method.description: The payment method used for any additional baggage charges.

reservation_id.description: The unique identifier of the updated flight booking.

additional_charge.description: The additional amount charged for the baggage changes in the default currency.

tools.name: cancel_reservation
tools.description: Cancel an entire flight reservation and process the applicable refund.

reservation_id.description: The unique identifier of the flight booking to be cancelled.
The unique identifier of the cancelled flight booking.

status.description: The current status of the reservation (will be 'cancelled').

refund_amount.description: The refund amount processed for the cancellation in the default currency.
